LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UNITED BROTHERHOOD OF CARPENTERS AND JOINERS OF AMERICAN LOCAL UNION NO. 22, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF REGARDING AN ARBITRAL CONTROVERSY. ALSO, THE COURT OVERRULES PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO RESPONDENT REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NTC. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER UNITED BROTHERHOOD OF CARPENTERS AND JOINERS OF AMERICAN LOCAL UNION NO. 22, Notice of Hearing on Petition to Compel Arbitration. Appearances: Jill J. Figg, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3971 appearing for Respondent and opposing party; Stewart Weinberg, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld appearing for Petitioner and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied. Failure to shift burden of proof regarding an arbitral controversy. Also, The Court overrules Plaintiff's objections to Respondent request for Judicial Ntc. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
